plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Foodorder to use your location to find nearby restaurants and deliver to your address.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Foodorder to use your location to find nearby restaurants and deliver to your address.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Foodorder to use your location in the background for delivery tracking.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Foodorder to access your photos so you can upload a profile picture or add food item images.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Foodorder to use your camera to take photos for your profile or food items.
